content: esbuild CLI: entry points (single or glob), --outdir for output directory, --bundle to follow imports, --watch for rebuild on change, fast enough for live-reload. Rollup: input/entryFileNames/chunkFileNames/assetFileNames for fine-grained output placement. Both: deterministic output, --watch mode, plugin APIs. Neither copies non-JS static assets by default (need plugins). Build tools wipe output dir before emitting; don't transform content that isn't their concern.
